title: OTel Logs Reporter
description: Reports API gateway request logs and traces via OpenTelemetry to Google Cloud Logging, an OTLP endpoint, or Google Cloud Trace.

enabled.description: Master switch for the reporter. Set to false to disable all log and trace export.

correlationHeader.description: HTTP request header used to propagate the trace/correlation ID into log records.

enabled.description: Enable or disable log record export.

exporter.description: Export backend: 'gcloud' writes directly to Cloud Logging; 'otlp' sends via OTLP/HTTP to a collector.

logName.description: Cloud Logging log name (used only when logs.exporter=gcloud). Appears under projects/{projectId}/logs/{logName}.

endpoint.description: OTLP/HTTP base URL (used only when logs.exporter=otlp). /v1/logs is appended automatically.

authMode.description: Authentication mode for OTLP export: 'none' — no auth header; 'gcp-adc' — Bearer token from Application Default Credentials; 'static' — headers from logs.headers.

batchSize.description: Maximum number of log records per export batch.

scheduledDelayMs.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds between automatic batch exports.

reportHealthChecks.description: Emit a log record for each endpoint health-check result.

reportRequestLogs.description: Emit a log record for each full request log (may contain PII; disabled by default).

reportMessageMetrics.description: Emit a log record for each message-level metric event (async/streaming APIs).

reportPayloads.description: Include request and response bodies as http.request.body / http.response.body attributes on Log records. Requires logs.reportRequestLogs=true. Bodies must already be filtered upstream by the API logging config — this flag only controls whether what arrives is forwarded. Disabled by default; keep disabled in production environments handling PII/PHI.

reportHeaders.description: Include request and response headers as JSON-encoded http.request.headers / http.response.headers attributes on Log records. Requires logs.reportRequestLogs=true. Same compliance posture as reportPayloads: headers commonly contain auth tokens, so keep disabled in production environments handling PII/PHI.

reportRequestSummary.description: Emit a per-request 'summary' log record from Metrics events. Default true preserves existing behaviour. Set false (combined with reportRequestLogs=true) to suppress the summary and rely solely on the detailed Log-derived record — one log per request instead of two.

enabled.description: Enable or disable span export to Cloud Trace.

exporter.description: Export backend for traces. Only 'otlp' is supported.

endpoint.description: OTLP/HTTP endpoint for trace export. Defaults to the Google Cloud Trace OTLP ingestion endpoint.

authMode.description: Authentication mode for trace export: 'gcp-adc' uses Application Default Credentials (recommended on GKE with Workload Identity).

batchSize.description: Maximum number of spans per export batch.

scheduledDelayMs.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds between automatic span batch exports.

sampler.description: Sampling strategy: 'parent-based-always-on' respects an inbound W3C traceparent; 'always-on' samples every request; 'ratio' samples at traces.sampleRatio.

sampleRatio.description: Fraction of requests to sample when traces.sampler=ratio (0.0–1.0).

serviceName.description: Value of the service.name OTel resource attribute.

serviceNamespace.description: Value of the service.namespace OTel resource attribute.

projectId.description: GCP project ID. Required when logs.exporter=gcloud or traces.enabled=true.

autoDetect.description: Detect GCP environment metadata (zone, cluster, pod) from the GCE metadata server.
